title: Danny’s AOT Multilang
description: Community-made multilingual translation pack for Danny’s AOT adding support for Spanish and future languages.
body:
# Danny's AOT Translated

## A community-made translation pack for Danny's AOT.

This resource pack adds translations for the mod, starting with Spanish (es_es), with plans to support more languages in the future.

## Current Languages

- Spanish
- Andalûh 
- Italiano
- Deutsch (German)
- Français
- Português 
- Russian (Русский)

## Goal

The purpose of this project is to help make Danny's AOT accessible to more players worldwide without taking development time away from the main mod itself.

## Want to Help?

If you'd like to contribute translations for your language (Russian, Japanese, French, Portuguese, etc.), feel free to contact me!

You can add me on Discord: _don_joaco_xd

## Important

Some text may still appear in English because it is not available in the mod's language files.

In certain cases, this happens because the text is hardcoded directly into the mod (bytecode-level / internal code strings), meaning it cannot be translated using a resource pack.

## Credits

Original mod by Danny7.
This project is an unofficial community translation pack.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/dannys-aot-multilang
